components.text:
Dear {{1}},

This is Dhana from Ulacab.com. We had the pleasure of meeting you at TTF Kolkata 2026.

Ulacab.com is a B2B transport provider helping Indian Travel Agents and OTAs directly book Airport Transfers and Ground Transportation across Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, Hong Kong & Macau, South Korea, and Japan.

Direct contracting with us helps you increase your profit margins. We look forward to receiving your enquiries for Airport Transfers and Ground Transportation.

You can reach us at:

- +65 8605 1421
- +91 95513 27334 (Call or WhatsApp)
- support@ulavitech.com

Best regards,

Dhana
Founder/Director
